description: kbd-signal device preset for the Keychron Q1 HE 8K (wired, VIA protocol 13). product_id is this unit's PID (0x1012) and may differ by keyboard layout - run 'kbd-signal detect --all' to confirm yours. Pinning it keeps a Link-KM docking station (a separate accessory that also enumerates as a 0x3434 raw-HID device when in use) from being picked by mistake; product_match 'Q1 HE' also distinguishes the two. reset_on_effect is true because this board resets color/brightness ~50-150ms after an effect change. Copy the device block into your config.json.
